Episodes.Title: The Titan on the Track
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Noah Hawley
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: An investigation into a train wreck that claimed three lives, one of them a U.S. senator. In other events, Brennan clashes with the new boss, Dr. Camille Saroyan, who has a romantic history with Booth.

Episodes.Title: Mother and Child in the Bay
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Stephen Nathan
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Booth seeks out the husband of a missing pregnant woman after her remains wash up onshore, but the suspect disappears. Meanwhile, Bones continues to clash with Cam, and Booth gets a visit from his ex.

Episodes.Title: The Boy in the Shroud
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Gary Glasberg
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: When a tractor-trailer collides with a garbage truck, the skeleton of a 17-year old boy is found in the trash. A facial imprint from a shroud that wrapped the body helps identify the victim as a suburban honor student.

Episodes.Title: The Blonde in the Game
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Noah Hawley
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Serial killer Howard Epps returns as he reaches out from prison in a deadly game involving Bones and Booth.

Episodes.Title: The Truth in the Lye
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Scott Williams
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: A body is found in a tub filled with lye at a construction site, and Booth reexamines his feelings for his son's mother after they have a fling.

Episodes.Title: The Girl in Suite 2103
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Christopher Ambrose
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: An explosion at a hotel has the team exploring drug cartel connections and struggling with diplomatic immunity.

Episodes.Title: The Girl with the Curl
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Karine Rosenthal
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: When a girl's body is identified as a missing pageant queen, the investigation focuses on her parents.

Episodes.Title: The Woman in the Sand
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Elizabeth Benjamin
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: A trip to Vegas to identify a body is complicated when a more recent body is found nearby.

Episodes.Title: Aliens in a Spaceship
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Janet Tamaro
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: When Hodgins and Brennan are buried alive, it's a race against time and a kidnapper who doesn't negotiate.

Episodes.Title: The Headless Witch in the Woods
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Karine Rosenthal
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: The headless skeleton of a young man is found in a state forest. Brennan and Booth's investigation becomes entangled in the local legend of a woman who was decapitated as a witch in the 1780s and is said to still haunt the forest.

Episodes.Title: Judas on a Pole
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Noah Hawley
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Booth and Bones investigate a murder that is connected to Bones' father. Meanwhile, after obtaining his doctorate, Zack gets a makeover to appear more professional.

Episodes.Title: The Man in the Cell
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Noah Hawley
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: After Howard Epps orchestrates an escape from his penitentiary, he starts picking off the Jeffersonian team one by one and taunting Brennan with clues to save them.

Episodes.Title: The Girl in the Gator
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Scott Williams
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: While Brennan is paired up with another FBI agent to solve the murder of a co-ed found inside an alligator in the Everglades, Booth is sent to therapy after shooting a clown-shaped speaker on an ice cream truck.

Episodes.Title: The Man in the Mansion
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Christopher Ambrose
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Hodgins' lapse in judgment may cause a murderer to be set free, Brennan explores the world of dating, and Booth continues his therapy.

Episodes.Title: The Bodies in the Book
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Karine Rosenthal
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Just as Temperance is preparing to publicize her latest book, bodies start showing up that are eerily similar to the victims in her mystery novel.

Episodes.Title: The Boneless Bride in the River
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Gary Glasberg
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Bones is called back from vacation - several times - after a boneless body is found, and Sully has a proposition.

Episodes.Title: The Priest in the Churchyard
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Lyla Oliver
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: When Booth and Brennan keep butting heads in a case involving a Catholic church, he convinces her to see Dr. Wyatt with him, and Hodgins suggest a change in his and Angela's relationship.

Episodes.Title: The Killer in the Concrete
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Dean Widenmann
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Booth's investigation into a presumed dead hit man turns quite dangerous, and Brennan ends up turning to an unlikely source for help.

Episodes.Title: Spaceman in a Crater
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Elizabeth Benjamin
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Bones and her team must determine how a man was flattened in a pasture when his injuries don't coincide with the theory of the crime.

Episodes.Title: The Glowing Bones in 'The Old Stone House'
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Stephen Nathan
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: Homeland security asks Bones to examine some remains, thinking they're radioactive, and although the site is cleared two questions remain: why was an up and coming chef murdered, and why are the bones still glowing?

Episodes.Title: Stargazer in a Puddle
Episodes.Writer: Hart Hanson, Kathy Reichs, Noah Hawley
Episodes.Actors: Emily Deschanel, David Boreanaz, Michaela Conlin
Episodes.Plot: As the wedding approaches, the team investigates the life/death of a little girl. Bones's father shows up, with an heirloom and a message from her mother.
